skills.name: hello-hermes
skills.description: Use when the user wants to test the Hermes skills hub connection. A simple test skill that demonstrates skill structure and verifies your custom hub is reachable.

skills.name: hermes-skills
skills.description: Manage skills from private GitLab hub. Browse, install, and uninstall skills using the hermes-skills CLI command.

skills.name: hermes-hub-browser
skills.description: Use when browsing available skills in the custom hub. Lists all skills in a table with copyable install commands.
